license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.x39fqr6
title: Tranfection of sgRNA using SpCas9 containing plasmids to generate cell lines with Cas9
author: Binnypreet Kaur

steps_raw.instruction: Step1: Assemble RNP complexes with (30pmol/μl) of gRNA and (20pmol/μl) of Cas9 in the ratio of (Cas9:gRNA) 1:9 in resuspension buffer before electroporation and keep it at room temperature for 10 min and then transfer it to ice untill use.
Step2: Follow the protocol 7 for transfection
